title: cutebear's furniture
description: A furniture plugin for paper with Geyser support.
body:
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/346ef787e4f3713a175e7c9e9a7ff8821b3822a7.png)

A furniture plugin for papermc.

Resources came from [paladins-furniture](https://github.com/UnlikePaladin/paladins-furniture), note this is an unoffical port.


## Install:
1. download resource pack from [here](https://codeberg.org/cutebear/FurnitureResource/releases) and set it as a server resource pack.
2. install the plugin

## Geyser install
1. Install Geyser after commit `b3cb9ff`, if you did not know what version you have just update to latest.
2. Make sure Floodgate is installed
3. install [ProtocolLib](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/protocollib.1997/)
4. Download and install [this](https://github.com/GeyserExtensionists/GeyserDisplayEntity) extension in `plugins/Geyser-Spigot/extensions/`
5. download mcpack from [here](https://codeberg.org/cutebear/FurnitureResource/releases) and put them in `plugins/Geyser-Spigot/pack`
6. put [this pack](https://github.com/GeyserExtensionists/GeyserDisplayEntity/raw/refs/heads/main/packs/GeyserDisplayEntityPack.mcpack) in `plugins/Geyser-Spigot/pack`
7. download json file from [here](https://codeberg.org/cutebear/FurnitureResource/releases) and put it in `plugins/Geyser-Spigot/custom_mappings/`

## Player guide:

Furniture could be made in the stonecutter

Most recipe currently are made of oak log, but the bathtub is made of quartz block.


## Notes:

While this plugin work on 1.21.3, the resource pack feature needed require 1.21.4, so you will have to use viaversion if you need to run 1.21.3 paper for some reason.

The plugin will function if you use a client below 1.21.4 other then the furniture will be a missing texture cube.

This plugin will not work on Spigot as I use paper only API.
